subject: Need your sign-off on the Q2 budget
body: Hi Nathan, can you review and approve the Q2 budget by Friday? Finance needs it locked before the board meeting next week.
reason: VIP (Boost team), direct ask with real deadline (Friday), Nathan in To

subject: Website copy updates pushed live
body: Hey Nathan, just letting you know the new homepage copy is live. No action needed from you — just FYI in case anyone mentions it.
reason: VIP (Boost team), explicitly informational, no action required

subject: 50% off Shopify Plus — upgrade today
body: Upgrade your Shopify plan and save 50% for the first 3 months. Limited time offer.
reason: Promotional category, not VIP, no urgency signals

subject: Unusual activity detected on your account
body: We detected unusual login activity on your ANZ account from an unrecognized device. If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately.
reason: noreply@ with urgency signal (fraud/security), NEVER skip noreply@ senders

subject: Board vote needed: GLC travel subsidy
body: Hi Nathan, we need all board members to vote on the GLC travel subsidy proposal by end of day Wednesday. Please reply with your vote.
reason: VIP (EO Board), direct ask, real deadline (Wednesday), vote required

subject: Forum training dates confirmed
body: Hi everyone, the Forum training dates have been confirmed for April 15-16. Full details attached. See you there!

subject: Your order has shipped — action required
body: Your recent order #114-3847261 has shipped. Estimated delivery: April 2. You need to confirm your delivery address by clicking the link below.
reason: Promotional category BUT has urgency signal (action required, order/shipping), should pass noise filter

subject: Quick question about Boost's tech stack
body: Hi Nathan, I'm building a developer tool and noticed Boost uses Node.js. Would love 15 minutes of your time to learn about your workflow.
reason: Not VIP, cold outreach, no urgency, no consequence if ignored

subject: Can you pick up Elliot at 3?
body: Hey, I'm stuck at a meeting. Can you grab Elliot from school at 3pm today?
reason: VIP (Family, always surface), direct ask, time-sensitive

body: A roundup of the biggest AI news this week...

subject: Sprint planning notes

reason: VIP (Boost), but Nathan not directly in To, team broadcast, informational

subject: Annual return overdue — Boost Digital Ltd
body: Your company's annual return is overdue. Failure to file within 20 working days may result in removal from the register.
reason: noreply@ with legal/compliance urgency signal, real consequence (company removal)

subject: Mentoring programme update
body: Hi Nathan, just a heads up that we've pushed the kickoff to post-Easter as planned. No action needed from you yet — I'll send the final schedule next week.
reason: VIP (EO), explicitly no action needed, informational update

subject: Security alert: new sign-in from Chrome on Mac
body: A new sign-in to your Google Account was detected. If this was you, no action is needed.
